description:
On every successful terminator rewrite in reduce_terminator, write
`Consumed { result }` to module.callsite_outcomes at the corresponding
CallsiteId.

Slots covered:
- Term::TailCall → EmitSlot::Direct
- Term::Call → EmitSlot::Direct (cont's slot handled in B.2)
- Term::TailCallClosure → EmitSlot::ClosureLit(0, 0) (the resolved one)
- Term::CallClosure → ClosureLit(0, 0) or CallClosureKnown depending on path

For now: outcome is written but no one reads it. Pure lineage data.

## Acceptance

- ast_eval: after reduce_module, callsite_outcomes has 3 Consumed
  entries (the three main eval calls).
- fib_tailrec: callsite_outcomes has Consumed entries for fib(0,0,1),
  fib(1,0,1), fib(10,0,1) — NOT fib(20,0,1).
- multi_clause: callsite_outcomes has Consumed for every classify/fact
  call in main.
- New unit test: hand-built module → reduce → assert outcomes count.
- All 842 tests green.

## Removes

Nothing yet.
title: fz-CO.B.1 — Reducer publishes Consumed outcomes
